title: centrosema virginianum subsp. angustifolium
intro: Centrosema virginianum subsp. angustifolium, also known as sensitive plant, is a perennial legume native to the Americas and parts of Africa. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and improve wound healing. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a valuable addition to natural remedies and herbal supplements. Centrosema virginianum subsp. angustifolium can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder for use in herbal medicine, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
